name: Sons Of Silence
description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Niwot, Colorado in 1966 by Bruce Gale Richardson. Designated a criminal organization by the U.S. Department of Justice. Has over 250 members with 35 chapters in 12 U.S. states and Germany. Sixth-largest motorcycle club worldwide.

sources.title: Hells Angels MC criminal allegations and incidents — Wikipedia
